policy: A carrier module is not considered done until it returns normalized events from a public or customer-provided real tracking number. Format examples, no-data responses, and empty timelines only prove plumbing.

results.result: Returned 8 normalized events, delivered=true, service level, weight, and USPS handoff metadata.
results.efficiency_path: Minimal browser warm plus captured browser-side POST https://api.dhlecs.com/webtrack/v4/tracking response.

results.result: Hand-coded DHL Worldwide scraper exists and uses browser-side fetch to DHL's tracking JSON surface, but it has not been revalidated in the standardized carrier ledger with a current real-event public sample.
results.efficiency_path: Warm DHL tracking page, then browser-side fetch to /int-verfolgen/data/search.

results.result: Hand-coded DHL Express scraper exists with warm response capture and browser-side utapi fetch, but it has not been revalidated in the standardized carrier ledger with a current real-event public sample.
results.efficiency_path: Warm DHL global tracking page, capture /utapi response when available, otherwise browser-side fetch to /utapi.

results.result: Hand-coded FedEx scraper exists and previously required browser-side token capture/sidecar behavior, but it needs a fresh real-event validation sample before being counted as verified.
results.efficiency_path: Warm FedEx tracking page, capture OAuth/token and app tracking response, then browser-side fetch to track/v2/shipments.

results.result: Returned 17 normalized events, delivered=true, recipient=TAYLOR, from UPS browser-side GetStatus flow.
results.efficiency_path: Warm UPS tracking page, use XSRF cookie, then browser-side POST to UPS GetStatus. No Node-side request is used.

results.result: Hand-coded USPS scraper exists and uses browser-side fetch plus DOMParser, but it needs a fresh real-event validation sample before being counted as verified.
results.efficiency_path: Warm USPS tracking page, then browser-side fetch to TrackConfirmAction and parse HTML in the browser.

results.result: Endpoint executed successfully but returned zero events for the public example number.

results.result: Returned 8 normalized events from the public DPD parcel JSON endpoints.

results.result: Dedicated PostNord sidecar verified against a public tracking link. The localized postnord.se page is Cloudflare-protected, so the module uses tracking.postnord.com and the official widget's browser proof header. Returned 10 normalized events and delivered status on 2026-06-20.
results.efficiency_path: Browser-side fetch from the warmed tracking.postnord.com page to the public trackingweb shipmentInformation endpoint with x-bap-key and X-CustomHeader proof-of-work.
